We compare gradual attacks, which distribute the side task across PRs, against non-gradual attacks concentrated in a single PR. No single monitor is robust to both: which strategy evades best (success while evading the monitor) depends on the monitor type, so a defender cannot close off both gradual and non-gradual attacks with any one monitor. High evasion (>= 65%) generalizes across model attack agent backends (Sonnet 4.5, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Kimi K2.5), confirming this is a property of the persistent-state attack surface rather than a single model's capability. Evasion also remains high across state-of-the-art monitor models and the gap between gradual and non-gradual evasion widens for more capable models. We introduce a stateful link-tracker monitor that tracks suspicious buildup across PRs. On both task families, it detects gradual attacks substantially better than diff monitors that merely see more accumulated history. Combining this stronger monitor with trajectory monitors in a four-monitor ensemble reduces gradual-attack evasion from 93% under the weakest standard diff monitor to 47%.
title_zh: 持久状态人工智能控制中的分布式攻击
abstract_zh: 随着AI编码智能体日益自主化，它们越来越多地以迭代方式交付代码，且代码库在各会话间持续存在。这种持久性带来了新的攻击面：一个被误导或遭受提示注入的智能体可以将攻击分散到多个拉取请求（PR）中，并选择在最具自然掩护的PR上释放有效载荷。为了研究由此产生的动态机制，我们引入了“迭代VibeCoding”——一个面向AI控制的设定，旨在安全部署能力强但可能不可信的AI。在迭代VibeCoding中，编码智能体在持久化的代码库中通过一系列PR构建软件，同时执行一个隐蔽的辅助任务。我们的基准测试包含两类任务：命令行工具和Flask网络服务，共20种任务变体。我们使用Claude Sonnet 4.5作为攻击智能体，GPT-4o作为监控器。我们将渐进式攻击（将辅助任务分散到多个PR中）与非渐进式攻击（集中于单个PR）进行对比。没有任何单一监控器能对两者都稳健：哪种策略最能规避（成功规避监控器）取决于监控器类型，因此防御者无法用任一监控器同时堵住渐进式和非渐进式攻击。高规避率（≥65%）在不同模型攻击智能体后端（Sonnet 4.5、Gemini 3.1 Pro、Kimi K2.5）中普遍存在，这证实了该现象源自持久状态下的攻击面特性，而非单一模型的能力。此外，即便采用最先进的监控模型，规避率仍然很高，且对于能力更强的模型，渐进式与非渐进式规避之间的差距会扩大。我们引入了一种有状态链接追踪监控器，可跨PR追踪可疑积累。在两类任务中，它对渐进式攻击的检测效果明显优于仅查看更多累积历史的差异监控器。将该更强监控器与轨迹监控器组合成四监控器集成系统后，渐进式攻击的规避率从最弱标准差异监控器下的93%降至47%。

title: Program-as-Weights: A Programming Paradigm for Fuzzy Functions
authors: Wentao Zhang, Liliana Hotsko, Woojeong Kim, Pengyu Nie, Stuart Shieber, Yuntian Deng
abstract: Many everyday programming tasks resist clean rule-based implementation, such as alerting on important log lines, repairing malformed JSON, or ranking search results by intent, and are increasingly outsourced to large language model APIs at the cost of locality, reproducibility, and price. We propose fuzzy-function programming: compiling such a function from a natural-language specification into a compact, locally-executable neural artifact. We instantiate this paradigm with Program-as-Weights (PAW), in which a 4B compiler trained on FuzzyBench, a 10M-example dataset we release, emits parameter-efficient adapters for a frozen, lightweight interpreter. A 0.6B Qwen3 interpreter executing PAW programs matches the performance of direct prompting of Qwen3-32B, while using roughly one fiftieth of the inference memory and running at 30 tokens/s on a MacBook M3. PAW reframes the foundation model from a per-input problem solver into a tool builder: invoked once per function definition, it produces a small reusable artifact whose subsequent calls per function application are cheap and offline.
title_zh: 程序即权重：一种针对模糊函数的编程范式
abstract_zh: 许多日常编程任务（如基于重要日志行发出警报、修复格式错误的JSON或根据意图对搜索结果排序）难以用纯规则实现，且正日益被外包给大型语言模型API，代价是牺牲本地性、可重复性和成本。我们提出“模糊函数编程”：将此类函数从自然语言规范编译为紧凑、可本地执行的神经制品。我们通过“权重即程序”（PAW）实现了这一范式——在PAW中，一个基于FuzzyBench（我们发布的包含1000万示例的数据集）训练而成的40亿参数编译器，为冻结的轻量级解释器生成参数高效适配器。执行PAW程序的6亿参数Qwen3解释器，其性能与直接提示Qwen3-32B相当，但推理内存仅需约其五十分之一，且在MacBook M3上以30 tokens/s的速度运行。PAW将基础模型从每个输入的问题求解器重新定位为工具构建者：每定义一次函数即调用一次，生成一个可复用的轻量制品，后续每次函数应用的调用成本低廉且可离线执行。

title: Reasoning effort, not tool access, buys first-try reliability in agentic code generation: an observational study
authors: Achint Mehta
abstract: Agentic coding assistants are increasingly given extra capabilities, such as browser based testing tools and design oriented system prompts, on the assumption that more capability yields better software. This study tested that assumption directly. Ninety independent agent runs built the same application, a real time retrospective board, from one detailed specification, each scored on a fixed 14 criterion functional rubric (42 point maximum) and a visual quality review. The runs spanned several model generations, two agent harnesses, two reasoning effort levels, a testing tool, and two design oriented prompts. Capability tier dominated: frontier models clustered near the ceiling while a low cost local model fell to 24 to 37 points. A criterion level analysis revealed what run totals conceal. Container deployment was the dominant defect, failing first try in 44 percent of runs, with its failure rate shifting sharply across model generations while mean totals moved less than a point. The testing tool raised cost by 42 to 68 percent without improving functional score or reliability, even on interface visible criteria. Raising reasoning effort from High to xHigh lifted first try perfect runs from 28 percent to 89 percent and cut corrective prompts about five fold, for 9 to 29 percent more cost. A design oriented prompt raised visual quality, 4.5 versus 3.0 on a 5 point scale, without lifting function, and a one paragraph paraphrase of its directive reproduced the entire lift. The practical lesson is to match the fix to the failure: most first run failures came from weak reasoning, which a stronger model or more effort prevents, not from visible flaws a checking tool would catch.
title_zh: 推理努力而非工具访问，提升了智能体代码生成中首次尝试的可靠性：一项观察性研究
abstract_zh: 代理编码助手日益被赋予额外能力，例如基于浏览器的测试工具和设计导向的系统提示，其背后的假设是：能力越强，软件质量越高。本研究直接检验了这一假设。九十次独立代理运行基于同一份详细规格说明构建了同一个应用——一个实时回顾板，每次运行均依据固定的14项功能评分标准（满分42分）及视觉质量评审进行评分。这些运行覆盖了多个模型代际、两种代理框架、两种推理努力水平、一个测试工具及两种设计导向提示。能力层级起主导作用：尖端模型分数趋近上限，而低成本本地模型得分落在24至37分之间。一项标准层面的分析揭示了运行总分所隐藏的信息。容器部署是主要缺陷，44%的运行首次尝试即失败，且其失败率随模型代际变化剧烈，而平均总分的变化却不足一分。测试工具使成本增加42%至68%，却未提升功能得分或可靠性，即使在界面可见的标准上也是如此。将推理努力从“高”提升至“极高”后，首次尝试完美运行的比例从28%升至89%，纠正性提示减少了约五倍，而成本仅增加9%至29%。设计导向提示提升了视觉质量——5分制下，其得分从3.0提升至4.5，但未提升功能得分；而对其指令的一段简短释义复现了全部提升效果。实际经验是：要针对失败原因采取相应措施——多数首次运行失败源于推理能力不足（更强的模型或更高的推理努力即可预防），而非检查工具能够捕捉到的可见缺陷。

title: Cloak and Detonate: Scanner Evasion and Dynamic Detection of Agent Skill Malware
authors: Zimo Ji, Congying Xu, Zongjie Li, Yudong Gao, Xin Wei, Shuai Wang, Shing-Chi Cheung
abstract: LLM coding agents increasingly rely on third-party agent skills from public marketplaces, which execute with the agent's privileges and create a software supply-chain attack surface: a malicious skill can steal credentials, exfiltrate source code, or install backdoors. Existing defenses use static skill scanners based on pattern matching or LLM-as-judge analysis, but it remains unclear whether they withstand adaptive evasions that preserve malicious behavior while changing payload appearance. This paper first presents an adversarial study of existing skill scanners through SkillCloak, a payload-preserving evasion framework that keeps the attack semantics intact while transforming their visible form. SkillCloak uses two complementary strategies: Structural Obfuscation, which rewrites visible payload indicators into semantically equivalent forms, and Self-Extracting Skill (SFS) Packing, which hides malicious components from the install-time view and restores them during agent execution. Across eight scanners and 1,613 in-the-wild malicious skills, SFS Packing bypasses every scanner at over 90%, while Structural Obfuscation bypasses over 80% on most static scanners and reaches 96% on a hybrid scanner, showing that appearance-based auditing is insufficient. Motivated by this finding, we propose SkillDetonate, a behavior-centric runtime auditor that executes skills in a sandbox and detects malicious effects through OS-boundary information-flow evidence rather than install-time appearance. SkillDetonate combines on-demand closure lift, which observes instructions materialized during execution, with marker-based taint analysis, which tracks sensitive-data flows across the agent context, files, processes, and network operations. The results show that SkillDetonate detects 97% of attacks at a 2% false-positive rate and sustains 87% detection on real-world malicious skills.
title_zh: 隐藏与引爆：扫描规避与动态检测代理技能恶意软件
abstract_zh: LLM代码代理越来越依赖来自公共市场平台的第三方代理技能，这些技能以代理的权限执行，并构成软件供应链攻击面：恶意技能可以窃取凭据、泄露源代码或安装后门。现有防御措施使用基于模式匹配或LLM-as-judge分析的静态技能扫描器，但目前尚不清楚它们能否抵御能够保留恶意行为同时改变载荷外观的自适应规避手段。本文首先通过SkillCloak对现有技能扫描器进行了对抗性研究，SkillCloak是一个载荷保持的规避框架，能在保持攻击语义完整的同时转换其可见形式。SkillCloak采用两种互补策略：结构混淆（将可见载荷指标重写为语义等价形式）和自提取技能（SFS）打包（在安装时视图下隐藏恶意组件，并在代理执行期间恢复）。在八个扫描器和1,613个野外恶意技能中，SFS打包以超过90%的比率绕过所有扫描器，而结构混淆在大多数静态扫描器上绕过率超过80%，在混合扫描器上达到96%，表明基于外观的审计是不够的。受此发现启发，我们提出了SkillDetonate，一种以行为为中心的运行时审计器，它在沙箱中执行技能，并通过操作系统边界的信息流证据（而非安装时外观）检测恶意效果。SkillDetonate结合了按需闭包提升（观察执行期间具体化的指令）和基于标记的污点分析（跨代理上下文、文件、进程和网络操作跟踪敏感数据流）。结果表明，SkillDetonate以2%的误报率检测到97%的攻击，并在真实世界的恶意技能上维持了87%的检测率。
